name: Kubernetes Node with Public IP
description: Kubernetes node has a public IP address, potentially exposing cluster infrastructure to the internet
conditions: status.addresses ANY (type == 'ExternalIP' AND address NOT MATCHES '^10\.|^172\.(1[6-9]|2[0-9]|3[01])\.|^192\.168\.')
remediation: Deploy nodes in private subnets without public IPs. Use NAT gateways for outbound traffic. Access nodes via bastion hosts or VPN. Use private GKE/EKS/AKS clusters.
